moved_logic_domains: Post text/media parsing model (img/video/yt/tiktok/audio + cleaned text + yt params) moved from PostCard in ForumRoot to features/feed/hooks/usePostMediaTextModel

DM text/media parsing remains separate and should be normalized later under DM ownership
notes: No server/API route, handler, or db util changes.
PostMediaStack and translation hook continue consuming the same derived model values.
ForumRoot heavy/deep metrics remained stable after pure ownership move.
